subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! This is a leaf from among the leaves of Thy celestial Paradise, stirred by the breaths of the Spirit [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی هذه ورقه من ورقات سدره فردوسک التی حرکتها نفحات روح
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for women, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @love of God
